name: 2223 Intervals
description: Four rounds of one-minute-on, one-minute-off intervals combining rope climbs, ski-erg calories, and max-rep overhead squats.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2017/12 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; the first 3 rounds are 2 minutes each, the 4th round extends to 3 minutes; 1 minute of rest after each round; scored by cumulative overhead squat reps across all rounds
